title: juniperus communis subsp. megistocarpa
intro: Juniperus communis subsp. megistocarpa, also known as the Rocky Mountain juniper, is a subspecies of the juniper tree that is native to the mountainous regions of western North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Juniperus communis subsp. megistocarpa include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Juniper berry tea, oil, and extract are common herbal preparations made from the plant, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from colds and flu to skin conditions and wounds.
